description:
Test coverage review for the gates feature (parent: bl-c97d). Repo policy is 100% line coverage.

Required cases:
- LinkType::Gates round-trips through serialize/deserialize.
- LinkType::Unknown(String) round-trips and preserves the original string.
- Older-format task file (no 'gates' links) still parses unchanged.
- 'bl close PARENT' rejects when at least one gates-linked child is still open.
- 'bl close PARENT' succeeds once all gates-linked children are closed.
- 'bl close CHILD' on a gate child works normally (gate semantics only apply to the parent).
- 'bl link add P gates C' creates the link; 'bl link rm' removes it.
- Mixed: a task with both dep and gates links resolves correctly in 'bl dep tree'.
- 'bl ready' does not surface gate children as ready until parent is closed (or document the chosen behavior — gates are about close, not claim, so this needs an explicit decision).
title: Test coverage review: gates feature
